ksa_text: Knowledge of AI model lifecycle governance, including model versioning strategies, performance monitoring, drift detection, retraining decision logic, and decommissioning procedures.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of performance tuning tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to Model Governance Analyst scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("model lifecycle", "performance.{0,15} ?:degrad|drift", "model.{0,10}lifecycle"). STRM composite is strong (0.4894); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation present: 1 match(es) in RSK job postings or certification scope. Competency appears in RSK role descriptions — sufficient to uphold.
